caseStudies.title: StateFarm Insurance
caseStudies.subtitle: Enterprise IAM Transformation
caseStudies.overview: StateFarm, one of the largest insurance providers in the United States, partnered with MetaHorizon to modernize their Identity and Access Management infrastructure across multiple business units serving over 85 million policies.
caseStudies.challenge: StateFarm faced significant challenges with their legacy IAM systems: fragmented identity management across 20+ business units, inconsistent access policies, manual provisioning processes taking 5-7 days, and compliance risks with SOX and HIPAA regulations. Their existing systems couldn't scale to support 60,000+ employees and thousands of external partners.
caseStudies.solution: MetaHorizon implemented a comprehensive SailPoint IdentityIQ solution integrated with Azure AD, ServiceNow for automated workflows, and custom connectors for legacy mainframe systems. We deployed role-based access control (RBAC) with 500+ business roles, automated joiner-mover-leaver processes, and implemented continuous access certification campaigns.
results: Reduced provisioning time from 5-7 days to 4 hours
Passed SOX and HIPAA audits with zero findings
Consolidated 20+ legacy systems into unified platform

testimonial.quote: MetaHorizon's expertise in IAM transformed our security posture. Their team's deep understanding of both technology and compliance requirements helped us achieve our modernization goals ahead of schedule.
testimonial.author: Michael Thompson

caseStudies.title: SoftNTek
caseStudies.subtitle: Cloud Security & DevOps Transformation
caseStudies.overview: SoftNTek, a leading software development company, engaged MetaHorizon to implement comprehensive cloud security and DevOps automation across their global delivery centers serving Fortune 500 clients.
caseStudies.challenge: SoftNTek needed to secure their multi-cloud environment (AWS, Azure, GCP) while enabling rapid development cycles. They faced challenges with inconsistent security policies, manual deployment processes, lack of visibility into cloud resources, and difficulty meeting client security requirements across different industries.
caseStudies.solution: MetaHorizon implemented a comprehensive DevSecOps framework with automated security scanning, infrastructure as code using Terraform, CI/CD pipelines with built-in security gates, and centralized cloud security monitoring. We also deployed Okta for unified identity management across all cloud platforms.
results: Reduced deployment time from 2 weeks to 2 hours
Achieved 100% security compliance across all environments

testimonial.quote: The DevSecOps transformation MetaHorizon delivered has been game-changing. We can now deliver secure software at speed while meeting the stringent requirements of our enterprise clients.
testimonial.author: Rajesh Patel

caseStudies.title: W.L. Gore & Associates
caseStudies.subtitle: Zero Trust Security Implementation
caseStudies.overview: W.L. Gore & Associates, the innovative materials science company behind GORE-TEX®, partnered with MetaHorizon to implement a Zero Trust security architecture protecting their global research and manufacturing operations.
caseStudies.challenge: Gore needed to protect sensitive intellectual property and research data across 50+ global facilities while maintaining collaboration capabilities. Their traditional perimeter-based security model was insufficient for protecting against modern threats and supporting their distributed workforce of 12,000+ associates.
caseStudies.solution: MetaHorizon designed and implemented a comprehensive Zero Trust architecture with identity-centric security, micro-segmentation, continuous verification, and least-privilege access. We deployed Okta for identity management, Zscaler for secure access, and implemented behavioral analytics for threat detection.
results: Enabled secure remote work for 100% of workforce
Protected 500+ TB of sensitive research data

testimonial.quote: MetaHorizon's Zero Trust implementation has fundamentally transformed how we protect our innovations. Their team understood our unique culture and security needs, delivering a solution that protects without hindering collaboration.
testimonial.author: Dr. Sarah Chen

caseStudies.title: Gap Inc.
caseStudies.subtitle: Retail Digital Transformation & IAM
caseStudies.overview: Gap Inc., one of the world's largest apparel retailers, engaged MetaHorizon to modernize their customer identity platform and secure their omnichannel retail experience serving millions of customers globally.
caseStudies.challenge: Gap faced challenges with fragmented customer identities across their brand portfolio (Gap, Old Navy, Banana Republic, Athleta), inconsistent customer experiences, security vulnerabilities in legacy systems, and inability to provide personalized experiences while maintaining privacy compliance with CCPA and GDPR.
caseStudies.solution: MetaHorizon implemented a unified customer identity platform using Okta Customer Identity Cloud, enabling single sign-on across all brands, progressive profiling, fraud detection, and privacy-compliant data management. We also implemented adaptive authentication and real-time threat detection.
results: Achieved 99.99% platform availability during peak seasons

testimonial.quote: The customer identity platform MetaHorizon built has transformed how our customers interact with our brands. The seamless experience across our portfolio has driven significant business results.
testimonial.author: Jennifer Martinez

caseStudies.title: Capital One
caseStudies.subtitle: Cloud-Native IAM & Security
caseStudies.overview: Capital One, a leading digital bank, partnered with MetaHorizon to implement cloud-native identity and access management solutions supporting their all-in cloud strategy and serving millions of customers.
caseStudies.challenge: As a cloud-first bank, Capital One needed IAM solutions that could scale to handle millions of customer identities, support microservices architecture, meet stringent financial regulations (SOX, GLBA, FFIEC), and enable rapid innovation while maintaining security.
caseStudies.solution: MetaHorizon implemented a cloud-native IAM architecture using Okta for workforce identity, custom microservices for customer identity, API security gateways, and automated compliance monitoring. We integrated with AWS services, Kubernetes, and implemented real-time risk-based authentication.
results: Passed all regulatory audits with zero findings

testimonial.quote: MetaHorizon's deep expertise in cloud-native IAM helped us scale our identity platform to support our digital banking vision. Their solutions have been critical to our cloud transformation.
testimonial.author: David Kim
